prompt: A traditional Japanese garden rendered in delicate watercolor style. A stone stepping-path of flat grey stones leads forward across a tranquil koi pond with clear shallow water. Orange and white koi fish glide beneath the surface. On both sides, meticulously trimmed bonsai pines and moss-covered rocks form balanced compositions. A red wooden torii gate stands in the middle distance. Drooping cherry blossom branches frame the scene with pink petals drifting downward. The color palette is soft and translucent: pale greens, warm pinks, and watery blues, with visible brushstroke textures. To the left, beyond the bonsai pines, a bamboo grove and a stone lantern sit beside a small arched wooden bridge. To the right, a raked gravel zen garden extends past the moss-covered rocks toward a low wooden teahouse with sliding paper screens. First-person viewer. First-person perspective, elevated eye-height camera looking forward along the stepping-stone path toward the torii gate. No character body visible.

scene_adherence.visible_part: This is a traditional Japanese garden rendered in delicate watercolor style. A stone stepping-path of flat grey stones leads forward across a tranquil koi pond with clear shallow water. Orange and white koi fish glide beneath the water surface. On both sides of the pond, meticulously trimmed bonsai pines and moss-covered rocks form balanced compositions. A red wooden torii gate stands in the middle distance. Drooping cherry blossom branches frame the scene with pink petals drifting downward. The color palette is soft and translucent: pale greens, warm pinks, and watery blues, with visible brushstroke textures.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: To the left, beyond the bonsai pines, a bamboo grove and a stone lantern sit beside a small arched wooden bridge. To the right, a raked gravel zen garden extends past the moss-covered rocks toward a low wooden teahouse with sliding paper screens.
